requesterName.description: Full name of the person requesting the report

reportType.description: Category or type of the health report requested

purpose.description: Intended use or purpose of the report

urgency.description: Urgency level of the requested report

neededDate.description: Target date when the report is needed (required if urgent)

status.description: Current status of the request (pending or completed)

requestDate.description: The date when the request was made

completedDate.description: The date when the request was completed

adminNotes.description: Internal notes or follow-up details from administrators

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the user who logged/requested it

createdAt.description: Firestore server timestamp of document creation

updatedAt.description: Firestore server timestamp of document modification

/requests/{requestId}.description: Collection of digital health report requests
